# H-M1: Per-Hypothesis Context
## Generated by Phase 2C Step 1 (JIT from 02b_verification_plan.md)

**Hypothesis ID:** H-M1
**Type:** MECHANISM
**Gate:** MUST_WORK
**Status:** IN_PROGRESS

---

## Hypothesis Statement

Under permutation stress (s=1.0), NFT encoders achieve significantly lower Δρ compared to flat-MLP because NFT's equivariant attention mechanism operates on neuron-level representations invariantly under permutation, as evidenced by the mechanism mediation analysis (ΔR² ≥ 0.10 when controlling for equivariance).

---

## Experimental Setup (from Phase 2A via Phase 2B)

**Dataset:**
- Name: Unterthiner FC-MLP zoo (MNIST, 2-4 layer)
- Type: standard (real, established)
- Source: Unterthiner et al. 2020; https://storage.googleapis.com/gresearch/dnn_predict_accuracy/
- Hypothesis Fit: FC-MLP zoo with known permutation symmetry; MNIST split provides ~1000 models for statistical power; same dataset used in H-E1 enables controlled comparison

**Model:**
- Name: 6-encoder comparison suite (flat-MLP, NFT-base, NFT+aug, NFT+canon, NFT+aug+canon, Oracle-canon)
- Type: Transformer-based weight encoders + MLP baseline variants
- Source: Zhou et al. 2023 (NFT), Unterthiner et al. 2020 (flat-MLP)
- Hypothesis Fit: NFT equivariant attention directly tests the mechanism; flat-MLP+aug/+canon serve as ablation controls to isolate architectural vs. engineering solutions

---

## Variables

- **IV:** Encoder architecture (6 variants: flat-MLP | NFT-base | flat-MLP+aug | NFT+aug | flat-MLP+canon | Oracle-canon)
- **DV:** Δρ under permutation stress; mediation ΔR² attributable to equivariance
- **CV:** Zoo (Unterthiner MNIST), permutation severity s∈{0, 0.25, 0.5, 1.0}, evaluation split

---

## Success Criteria

- NFT-base Δρ < 0.02 vs. flat-MLP Δρ > 0.10 (reconfirm from H-E1)
- Mechanism mediation ΔR² ≥ 0.10 (NFT equivariance explains variance beyond augmentation)
- Ablation: flat-MLP+aug narrows but doesn't close gap; NFT-base without aug still robust

---

## Gate Conditions

**Gate Type:** MUST_WORK
- **PASS:** NFT-base Δρ < 0.02 AND ΔR² ≥ 0.10 confirming mechanism mediation
- **FAIL:** STOP mechanism chain → document that flat-MLP+aug may suffice → execute PIVOT to augmentation-focused design

---

## Prerequisites (Satisfied)

- **H-E1:** COMPLETED (PASS)
  - flat_mlp_delta_rho = 0.1595 (> 0.10 ✅)
  - nft_delta_rho = 4.09e-6 (< 0.02 ✅)
  - NFT equivariance confirmed, mechanism differential established

---

## Continuation Notes

This hypothesis BUILDS ON H-E1:
- Same dataset (Unterthiner MNIST zoo) — controlled comparison
- Expands from 2-encoder (flat-MLP vs NFT-base) to 6-encoder suite
- Adds mediation analysis to establish WHY NFT outperforms (mechanism vs. coincidence)
- Optimal hyperparameters from H-E1: Adam lr=1e-3, batch=64, epochs=100, MSE loss
